themes.title: Advanced Use Case Driven
themes.characteristics: Sponsors pursue cutting-edge agentic workflows on specific, high-complexity use cases (e.g. multi-step knowledge work, cross-system orchestration). Strong technical or innovation sponsorship; appetite for co-innovation and iterative validation. Success is measured by workflow outcomes on the chosen use case, not by enterprise roadmap completeness first.

themes.title: Agentic Roadmap & Strategy Driven
themes.characteristics: Executive-led programs focused on enterprise agentic strategy: portfolio sizing, phase gates, operating model, and multi-wave roadmaps. Engagement emphasizes methodology adoption, governance, and capability building across functions. MVP work supports the roadmap narrative rather than replacing it.

themes.title: Labor Productivity Improvement Driven
themes.characteristics: Primary driver is measurable labor efficiency: cycle time, throughput, FTE redeployment, or cost-per-transaction. Favors high-volume, more deterministic workflows and clear ROI framing. Operations or finance sponsorship is typical; Quick Win–style entry paths are common.

themes.title: WEF Lighthouse Driven
themes.characteristics: Motivated by World Economic Forum / manufacturing lighthouse–style excellence: showcase sites, peer benchmarking, and physical–digital convergence. Narratives often tie to supply chain resilience, quality, sustainability, or smart operations. Visibility and referenceability matter alongside hard ROI.

themes.title: Agentic HR & Org Design Driven
themes.characteristics: CHRO- or org-effectiveness–led programs reimagining how the future agentic enterprise is organized and how HR itself runs on agents. Scope spans operating-model redesign, role and skill redefinition, and agentic HR use cases (talent acquisition, learning, performance, workforce planning, employee experience). Success is measured by workforce capability, span-of-control reshaping, and HR-ops productivity, with change management treated as a first-class workstream rather than a downstream task.
